cards.title: my-review-skill’s blocking question gates
cards.body:
88% of answers took the recommended option — the gate is ceremony.

Config responsible: ~/.claude/skills/my-review-skill/SKILL.md

variants.label: Patch the skill: add AUTOPILOT mode
variants.name: Patch ~/.claude/skills/my-review-skill/SKILL.md: gates become decide-and-log

diff.note: Keeps the review, removes the blocking.

lines: STOP. Ask the user before continuing.
In AUTOPILOT (user away): adopt your recommendation, log it, continue.

info.title: Interruptions
info.body: Escape presses are you steering — no config causes or removes them.
